reviewer hit max runtime 300000ms

I'll inspect the changes and review them. Let me start by looking at the git diff.
Let me inspect the full diff of the in-scope files plus the unexpected README change.
The README change is out of scope (continual-learning, unrelated). Let me check if it's from this task or pre-existing, and review the other two files.
Now let me read the existing planner.ts helpers to verify consistency, and check the extractJsonBlock regression test is preserved.
Let me verify how tests run, whether there's a typecheck gate, and the rendering section of planner.ts.
Let me check for other consumers of PlannerPlan/validatePlannerPlan that might break with the new fields, and confirm the README change origin.
Let me read the full updated planner.md contract block and the rest of renderFounderPlan to confirm correctness.
The in-scope code looks correct and complete. Let me check two things: whether a stray out-of-scope README change would be swept into the commit, and whether there's a typecheck gate that the new code must satisfy.
Let me check what the commit action stages — whether it sweeps all changes or scopes them.
In-scope logic looks correct. Let me verify two potential concerns empirically: (1) the `hasContent` type guard narrowing `PlannerAssumption[]` to `unknown[]` (possible type-safety regression), and (2) confirm the test suite actually passes as the tester claimed. First let me check whether a typecheck happens anywhere and whether tsc is available.
